title: elytrigia repens var. glauca
intro: Elytrigia repens var. glauca, also known as blue couch grass, is a perennial grass-like plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of blue couch grass include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and digestive issues. Blue couch grass can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
